article_title: B.C. Reg. 243/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: BC Assessment updates 2026 valuation rates for railways, pipelines, power lines, and telecom rights of way
briefs.summary: BC Reg. 243/2025 amends the Railway, Pipeline, Electric Power and Telecommunications Corporation Rights of Way Valuation Regulation, updating the reference year to 2026 and replacing the valuation rate table effective for the 2026 assessment cycle.
briefs.action_required: Review updated valuation rates if your business holds railway, pipeline, power line, or telecom rights of way in BC.

key_dates.label: BC Rights of Way Valuation Regulation 2026 rates take effect

briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 243/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
